name: HRE_TOUCHPT_SUMMARY
description: It will store the computed touchpoints summary of interactions and checkins for team and company.

columns.Name: TOUCHPT_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key for this table.

columns.Name: INTERACTION_DATA
columns.Comments: Interaction Data object for Coach O Agent

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M

columns.Name: INTRCNS_TEAM_DIRECTS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count of direct employees under Manager hierarchy having interactions.

columns.Name: TEAM_TOTAL_INTERACTIONS
columns.Comments: Count of total number of interactions per team for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: TEAM_TOTAL_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Count of total number of checkins per team for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: TEAM_AVG_INTERACTIONS
columns.Comments: Average number of interactions per team for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: INTRCNS_CMPNY_DIR_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count of direct employees in the company having interactions.

columns.Name: CHECK_INS_TEAM_DIRECTS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count of team directs having checkins

columns.Name: CHECK_INS_CMPNY_DIRECTS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count of company directs having checkins

columns.Name: COMPANY_TOTAL_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Count of checkins in the company

columns.Name: COMPANY_TOTAL_INTERACTIONS
columns.Comments: Count of interactions in the company

columns.Name: COMPANY_AVG_INTERACTIONS
columns.Comments: Average number of interactions of all teams for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: TEAM_AVG_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Average number of checkins per team for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: COMPANY_AVG_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Average number of checkins of all teams for the aggregation period.

columns.Name: TEAM_COMPLETED_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Count of total number of completed checkins in team for the current month.

columns.Name: TEAM_PENDING_CHECK_INS
columns.Comments: Count of total number of pending checkins in team for the current month.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
